rationale: All AC satisfied: protocol/loader/runner packages exist with documented types, loader uses KnownFields(true) with file context errors, runner injects documented env vars and runs in parallel via goroutines treating non-zero exit and missing result files as error, and `ddx ac run <bead-id>` with --check flag is wired and exits 1 on block/error. Result.json reports success.

findings.summary: Bead-review changed-files set lists only evidence JSON; full implementation lives in earlier commit 1a7da8b0 (verified via git diff b5f5b7a0..HEAD --stat showing cli/cmd/ac.go, cli/internal/checks/{protocol,loader,runner,*_test}.go and testdata/fixture_check.sh).
Runner cleans stale result file before invoking command, ensuring crashed checks correctly classify as status=error rather than reusing prior output.
Loader rejects unknown YAML fields via dec.KnownFields(true) and wraps decode errors with the file path; yaml.v3 includes line:column in its error messages.
